aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Aire Serv of Carmel due to their strong local presence and structured content, but improvements in schema markup and conversational content can significantly boost their visibility.

Enhance content with more conversational language focused on user intent.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
